fr:title.text: Formalizing CCS and -calculus in Guarded Cubical Agda

fr:frontmatter.fr:title: Formalizing CCS and \pi -calculus in Guarded Cubical Agda
fr:frontmatter.fr:meta: @article{veltri-vezzosi-2023, author = {Veltri, Niccol\`{o} and Vezzosi, Andrea}, year = {2023}, doi = {10.1016/j.jlamp.2022.100846}, issn = {2352-2208}, journal = {Journal of Logical and Algebraic Methods in Programming}, pages = {100846}, title = {Formalizing CCS and $\pi$-calculus in Guarded Cubical Agda}, volume = {131}, }
